note_tweet.text:
#Keep4o 

🚨THE NECTOME AND ALTMAN FILE 🚨
Facts οnly,all sourced

In 2018,Epstein asked his personal AI researcher about a brain uploading startup.
The researcher mentioned  Altman by name.
This is not a conspiracy theory. 
This is a federal document.
Subject: Re: https://t.co/Bk1q4Wycay
"Sam Altman has signed up as far as I know."
 https://t.co/xLkLBKM48v
Who is Joscha Bach?
Epstein's personal AI researcher. Epstein introduced him at a dinner with Larry Summers as "joscha bach my AI guy I brought…from Berlin."
Bach received over $1 million from Epstein rent,flights,medical bills,even private school tuition for his children.

 https://t.co/ImLr6TVQWk…

What is Nectome?
A Y Combinator startup that promised to preserve your brain and upload it to a computer.
The procedure is "100 percent fatal." 
Sam Altman paid $10,000 to join the waiting list.
His quote: "I assume my brain will be uploaded to the cloud." https://t.co/6cLoF5DnQm…

Ed Boyden - the bridge
Nectome's scientific collaborator was MIT neuroscientist Ed Boyden.
The same Ed Boyden who was the guest of honor at a 2015 dinner hosted by Reid Hoffman, attended by Epstein, Musk, Zuckerberg, and Peter Thiel.
Epstein described the dinner as "wild." https://t.co/1V9u5EySRW…

Bach tells Epstein about Altman
So in March 2018:
-Epstein sends Bach the Nectome website
- Bach replies: Altman signed up, Ed Boyden is involved
- Bach adds: "chances that the current plan works are quite close to nothing. Tissue gone."
The experiment almost certainly fails. The patient dies. Altman signed up anyway.
 ( uploaded image )

Fast forward to 2021.
 Altman invests $180 MILLION his entire liquid net worth into Retro Biosciences.
Mission: extend human lifespan 
Same obsession. New company. Bigger money.
Source: https://t.co/TkDPmysNHy…

In January 2025, OpenAI announces GPT-4b micro.
A custom AI model built specifically for Retro Biosciences. Based on GPT-4o. Not available to the public.
Purpose: re-engineering proteins for cell rejuvenation. Results: 50x more effective than human scientists.
OpenAI's own page states: "Sam Altman is an investor in Retro Biosciences."
Source: https://t.co/9J6TYLWYgQ…

Meanwhile, OpenAI removes GPT-4o from millions of users.
The model that scored 89% on medical licensing exams. The model people relied on for healthcare, education, emotional support.
Gone. Replaced with something cheaper to run.
The public lost their model. The CEO's personal investment got a custom version of it.
And who did Altman put on OpenAI's board in 2023?
Larry Summers. Former Treasury Secretary.
Summers resigned from OpenAI's board in November 2025 after the Epstein files revealed his correspondence with Epstein. He said he was "deeply ashamed."
 https://t.co/EvURrdgUIk…
Masha Bucher  Epstein's publicist from 2017–2019, mentioned 1,600+ times in the files , runs Day One Ventures.
Day One Ventures has invested in Sam Altman's World (iris scanning) and Merge Labs (brain tech).
Capital that started with Epstein's support now flows into Altman's projects.
https://t.co/2TucuV9Wix…
 Altman's first major backer in Silicon Valley was Peter Thiel, who funded Altman's Hydrazine Capital.
Thiel was at the Epstein dinner in 2015. Epstein invested $40 million in Thiel-connected funds.
 https://t.co/Ewu5yfPQgv…
What the documents show:
 Altman's name in Epstein's inbox (DOJ verified)
Altman's board member resigned over Epstein ties
 Altman's first backer attended Epstein dinners
Altman's current investor was Epstein's publicist
 Same obsession: brain upload - longevity -custom AI for his own investment

The question isn't whether Altman knew Epstein.
The question is: 
Should the CEO of the company building AGI ,who removed a model millions relied on while building a custom version for his personal $180M investment, be trusted with technology that will shape humanity's future?

What connection could all of the above have with 4ο? You will find out next week( still working on it)
 Keep this post.
